Description: The kind of the event. The highest categorization field in the hierarchy.
Name of the module this data is coming from.
Whether the metric is currently enabled.
Name of the metric (e.g. router.queue.size, events.unclassified).
Collection type of the metric (e.g. pull, counter).
Numeric value of the metric. Can be an integer count or a floating-point ratio.
Wazuh space name. Null for global metrics, a string for space-scoped metrics.
